heading.title: Welcome to Capital University Housing
heading.subtitle: From here you can manage your account, track your application, or access housing services

profile.title: Your Account
profile.subtitle: View and update your personal and academic data, and track the status of your university housing application.

application_dates.title: Available Application Dates
application_dates.subtitle: Check the opening and closing dates for applying or renewing university housing.

apply_or_renew.title: Apply / Renew Residency
apply_or_renew.subtitle: Submit or renew your university housing application and upload the required documents electronically.

meals.title: Meal Plans
meals.subtitle: Book your daily meals, track your balance, and view the weekly meal schedule.

attendance.title: Attendance Tracking
attendance.subtitle: Record your daily attendance and view your attendance history.

room_details.title: Room Details
room_details.subtitle: Find out your building and room number, roommates, and housing rules.

application_guide.title: University Housing Application Guide
application_guide.subtitle: Learn the application steps, details for each step, and watch the explanatory video.

application_status.title: Track Application Status
application_status.subtitle: Follow the status of your university housing application and see whether it has been accepted or rejected.

violations.title: Violations & Penalties
violations.subtitle: Check your record of violations or warnings within the university housing.

complaints.title: Submit a Complaint or Inquiry
complaints.subtitle: Send a complaint or inquiry to the university housing administration and track the response.

maintenance.title: Maintenance Request
maintenance.subtitle: Submit a maintenance request for your room or building and set the priority level.

rules.title: Rules & Guidelines
rules.subtitle: Review the regulations and instructions for staying in university housing.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: View important alerts, new updates, and status changes.

fees.title: Fees & e-Payment
fees.subtitle: Track your subscription and accommodation fees and make electronic payments.

visit_request.title: Visit Request
visit_request.subtitle: Submit a request to visit the university housing and schedule your visit.
